name: Lite and Tasty Four-Flavored Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray the bottom of a 9x5x3 inch loaf pan with cooking spray and dust with flour.
2. Set aside.
3. In a large bowl, combine sifted cake flour, baking powder, salt, and white sugar.
4. Add vegetable oil and skim milk; beat at medium speed until batter is smooth (batter will be thick).
5. Stir in vanilla, almond, lemon, and rum extracts.
6. Gently fold in about one third of the egg whites.
7. Fold in the remaining egg whites.
8. Pour batter into prepared pan.
9. Bake at 350°F for 40 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
10. Cool in pan for 10 minutes, then remove and finish cooling on a wire rack.
Makes 16 servings.
